title: Sales Manager — Engineering Products & Solutions (Contract)
description_raw:
Michael Page Engineering are recruiting a Sales Manager on a contract basis for a precision engineering components manufacturer in Coventry. The role covers the Midlands territory.

Responsibilities:
- Develop new business relationships with automotive OEM clients and tier 1 suppliers
- Manage existing accounts and identify cross-sell opportunities
- Attend trade shows and industry events
- Report pipeline and revenue forecasts to the Business Development Director

Profile:
- Engineering background preferred
- 5+ years B2B sales in manufacturing or industrial sector
- Full UK driving licence required

Rate: £300–350/day
Duration: 6 months
Start: July 2026
